zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily de Muschamp於大約1105年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Robert de Muschamp40歲，母親Agnes42歲。她和Stephen de Bulmer至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1180年在英國諾圖波藍德武爾享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily de Muschamp于大约1105年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲Robert de Muschamp40岁，母亲Agnes42岁。她和Stephen de Bulmer至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1180年在英国諾圖波藍德武爾享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Muschamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North and South Muskham (Notts), recorded in gallicized forms such as Muscamp and Muschamp from the 12th century onwards.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily de Muschamp was born about 1105, in Northumberland, England, her father, Robert de Muschamp, was 40 and her mother, Agnes, was 42. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Stephen de Bulmer. She died in 1180, in Wooler, Northumberland, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily de Muschamp est née environ 1105, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Muschamp, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Stephen de Bulmer. Elle est décédée en 1180, à Wooler, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily de Muschamp um 1105 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Muschamp 40 und ihre Mutter Agnes 42. Sie hatte mit Stephen de Bulmer mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1180 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Wooler, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Muschamp è nata il circa 1105 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, Robert de Muschamp, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Stephen de Bulmer. Morì nel 1180, nel Wooler, Northumberland, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily de Muschampが約1105年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Robert de Muschampは40歳，母Agnesは42歳であった。彼女はStephen de Bulmerとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1180年にイギリスノースウンバーランドウラーで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily de Muschamp(이)가 대략 1105년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Muschamp(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Stephen de Bulmer(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1180년 영국 노르스벌랜드 보러에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Stephen de Bulmer. Ela faleceu em 1180, em Wooler, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily de Muschamp родилась около 1105 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Muschamp было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Stephen de Bulmer. Она умерла в 1180 г. в местности вулир, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.
